specs.title: @smoke TC-API-001 | GET /api/patients returns all patients
@smoke TC-API-002 | GET /api/patients/:id returns single patient
@regression TC-API-003 | GET /api/patients/:id returns 404 for invalid ID
@smoke TC-API-004 | POST /api/patients creates a new patient
@regression TC-API-005 | POST /api/patients returns 400 for missing fields
@regression TC-API-006 | DELETE /api/patients/:id deletes a patient
@smoke TC-API-007 | GET /api/appointments returns all appointments
@smoke TC-API-008 | POST /api/appointments creates new appointment
@regression TC-API-009 | POST /api/appointments returns 400 for missing fields
@smoke TC-API-010 | GET /api/vitals/:patientId returns vitals
@smoke TC-API-011 | POST /api/vitals records new vitals

@regression TC-APT-006 | Complete an appointment
@regression TC-APT-007 | Cancel an appointment

@smoke TC-AUTH-009 | Logout redirects to login page

@smoke TC-E2E-001 | Complete patient journey: login → register → vitals → appointment → logout
@regression TC-E2E-002 | Dashboard navigation flow
@regression TC-E2E-003 | View existing patient details with vitals and prescriptions
@smoke TC-PAT-001 | Patient list page loads correctly

@regression TC-PAT-005 | Search with no results
